gist.headline: Enter the Techno Bot
gist.blurb: Techno Bot just landed in our community showcase! This AI-powered Discord entertainment bot is already buzzing across 40,000+ servers, bringing the noise with Pollinations under the hood.
gist.summary: Added Techno Bot, an AI-powered Discord entertainment bot used in over 40,000 servers, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Techno Bot in our community directory and see how Pollinations scales to support massive Discord communities.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a Discord bot called 'Techno Bot' that provides entertainment. Visuals should include a robot/bot with musical or DJ/techno elements, interacting with the Pollinations bee. A cozy pixel art DJ booth or server rack.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones, floating next to a chunky retro robot with a glowing CRT monitor head playing a DJ deck. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'TECHNO BOT'. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
